description_long: This is a large, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular form and a predominantly grayish-green coloration. The surface is uneven, featuring a mix of rough, jagged edges and flatter planes, with some darker crevices and shadowed areas suggesting natural weathering. The top of the rock is relatively broad and slightly domed, while the sides taper down with pronounced indentations and protrusions. The coloration varies subtly, with mossy green tints blending into darker gray and black patches, giving it a natural, earthy appearance. The rock appears solid and heavy, with no visible openings or cavities. Its overall form and texture suggest it could serve as a natural barrier or obstacle in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A large, rugged gray-green rock with an uneven, angular surface and natural weathering. Its solid, heavy appearance and earthy tones make it suitable as a landscape barrier or obstacle.
description_view_0: The top view shows a broad, slightly domed surface with subtle greenish hues and rough texture.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights deep crevices and pronounced angular edges, with darker shadowed areas.
description_view_2: The front view reveals a symmetrical, rugged face with visible indentations and a mix of green and gray tones.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing more jagged protrusions and a sloping surface with a blend of dark and light patches.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped green space
